pi_items.source: setup_task.sh creates a Project with the name 'ISO 13485 Prep'.
setup_task.sh creates a Document with the title 'Legacy System Spec'.
setup_task.sh creates a DocumentCategory 'Technical documentation', and verifier.py checks that it has been deleted.
verifier.py checks that the DocumentCategory 'User Manuals' exists.
verifier.py checks that the DocumentCategory 'Test Plans' exists.
verifier.py checks that the DocumentCategory 'Audit Reports' exists.

privileged_info_summary: The task environment synthetically creates a Redmine project named 'ISO 13485 Prep' containing a document titled 'Legacy System Spec' that is initially categorized under 'Technical documentation'. The validation logic verifies that 'Technical documentation' is deleted, 'User Manuals', 'Test Plans', and 'Audit Reports' categories exist, and that the target document is reassigned to the 'Test Plans' category.
